titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Graduate School of Arts and Sciences, Yale University, Records of the Dean IMPORT 2018-10-05T14:05:48.205-04:00
Graduate School of Arts and Sciences, Yale University, Records of the Dean IMPORT 2018-10-05T14:05:48.205-04:00
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

did.unittitle: Graduate School of Arts and Sciences, Yale University, records of the dean IMPORT 2018-10-05T14:05:48.205-04:00
did.abstract: The records consist of subject files, reports, memoranda and meeting minutes documenting the departments, fellows, faculty, and general administration of the Yale Graduate School of Arts and Sciences. The records include the files of deans Wilbur L. Cross (1916-1930), Edgar S. Furniss (1930-1950), Hartley Simpson (1956-1961), John Perry Miller (1961-1969), Donald Wayne Taylor (1969-1975), Jaroslav Jan Pelikan (1973-1974, acting dean and 1975-1978), Keith Stewart Thomson (1979-1986), Thomas Applequist (1993-1997) and Lynn Cooley (2014-present).

odd.head: General
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 25-A (YRG 25-A), Central records and records of the dean of the Yale Graduate School.

accessrestrict.head: Information about Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is partially restricted. See Collection Contents for details.

prefercite.head: Cite As
prefercite.p: Graduate School of Arts and Sciences, Yale University, Records of the Dean (RU 948). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

scopecontent.head: Description of the Collection
scopecontent.p: The records consist of subject files, reports, memoranda and meeting minutes documenting the departments, fellows, faculty, and general administration of the Yale Graduate School of Arts and Sciences. The records include the files of deans Wilbur L. Cross (1916-1930), Edgar S. Furniss (1930-1950), Hartley Simpson (1956-1961), John Perry Miller (1961-1969), Donald Wayne Taylor (1969-1975), Jaroslav Jan Pelikan (1973-1974, acting dean and 1975-1978), Keith Stewart Thomson (1979-1986), Thomas Applequist (1993-1997) and Lynn Cooley (2014-present).

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.
